name: MODINE MANUFACTURING CO
business: Modine designs, manufactures, and sells thermal management solutions for data center, commercial, industrial, and vehicular applications. The company provides cooling systems for data centers, heat exchangers for HVAC&R, and thermal components for on- and off-highway vehicles.
sellsTo: Agricultural, industrial, and construction equipment OEMs
Truck, bus, automobile, and specialty vehicle OEMs

exposures.sentence: The Data Centers business provides innovative thermal management solutions for data center customers in North America, Europe, the Middle East and Africa ( EMEA ), and Asia Pacific.

We see great opportunity in growing our Data Centers business in light of trends in high-performance computing, with significant data center growth fueled by artificial intelligence ( AI ), resulting in a commensurate need for data center cooling solutions.

In addition, this business provides products and solutions for zero-emission and hybrid passenger car, commercial vehicle, bus and specialty vehicles, including complete battery thermal management systems, electronics cooling packages, battery chillers, battery cooling plates, coolers and casings for electronics cooling, and coolers for e-axles.

Power generation and transmission cooling products, primarily sold to power generation and transmission and pulp and paper markets, include motor and power generator cooling coils, transformer oil coolers, radiators, dryers and industrial heat exchangers to the industrial power generation, conversion, and transmission and industrial process markets in EMEA, China, and North America.
The Heavy-Duty Equipment business sells cooling module generator sets ( Gensets ).
The Heavy-Duty Equipment business provides heat exchangers and cooling modules for off-highway markets, including agricultural and construction.
The Heavy-Duty Equipment business provides heat exchangers and cooling modules for off-highway markets, including agricultural and construction.

Indoor air quality products, primarily sold to the North American school and commercial HVAC markets, include single packaged unit ventilators, ceiling cassettes, modular chillers, air handling units, condensing units and desiccant dehumidifiers.

Heating products, primarily sold to the North American residential, commercial, industrial, portable, and agricultural heating markets, include unit heaters (indirect & direct gas-fired, hydronic, electric and oil-fired); roof-mounted direct- and indirect-fired makeup air units; duct furnaces (indoor and outdoor); infrared units (high- and low-intensity); and perimeter heating products (cabinet unit heaters and convectors).

catalysts.event: Expected closing of Gentherm Reverse Morris Trust transaction
catalysts.sentence: This transaction, which we expect will close by the end of calendar 2026, will transform our company into a pure-play climate solutions company focused on the data center and commercial HVAC&R markets.

catalysts.event: Long-term capacity agreement with data center customer valued at over $4 billion in sales from 2027 to 2029
catalysts.sentence: We expect to sell more than $4 billion of data center cooling products to this customer during calendar years 2027 through 2029.
In fiscal 2026, we expanded our chiller line and introduced a 3-megawatt chiller, the TurboChill 3+MW, to handle higher heat loads.
